mechanism_narrative: A higher or rising FEDFUNDS rate lifts the short-end discount rate and tightens financial conditions, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days as markets reprice the policy path and term premium.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS rises over the prior month but the 10-year yield falls on average over the next 20 trading days, or if the signal has negative out-of-sample Rank IC over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening labor demand and lower expected inflation pressure, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to fall over the next 20 trading days as growth expectations are marked down.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points versus 3 months earlier
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by higher 10-year yields more often than lower yields, or if the average 20-day yield change is positive across triggered cases in a rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales growth in RSAFS accelerates while housing starts in HOUST remain firm, the market interprets stronger real demand and firmer future inflation, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth is positive and HOUST is above its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition is met but the 10-year yield falls in a majority of triggered observations, or if the interaction term adds no incremental explanatory power versus single-proxy models.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO signals stronger industrial activity and tighter real activity conditions, which raises expected nominal growth and term premium, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month changes in INDPRO are followed by negative 60-day yield changes more than 50% of the time, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in CPIAUCSL inflation relative to FEDFUNDS signals a decline in real policy rates, which forces bond markets to demand higher nominal yields over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation exceeds FEDFUNDS by at least 1 percentage point
failure_condition: Reject if the spread condition is met but the 10-year yield does not rise within 5 trading days in at least 60% of cases, or if the spread loses predictive power after accounting for lagged yield moves.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in PAYEMS together with a declining UNRATE indicates labor-market tightening and stronger income growth, which supports higher expected demand and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield upward over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises on a 3-month average basis and UNRATE is flat or falling
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous payroll gains and falling unemployment are not followed by higher yields on average, or if the sign flips during multiple consecutive employment releases.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains unchanged, real rates fall and inflation expectations rise, so the 10-year Treasury yield increases over the next 20 trading days as markets price a tighter future policy path.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates for 2 consecutive months while FEDFUNDS is unchanged
failure_condition: Reject if inflation acceleration without policy response is followed by flat or lower yields in most triggered cases, or if the effect disappears once recent Treasury moves are included.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in HOUST after an elevated level signals cooling interest-sensitive demand and weaker future growth, which lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days as bond markets anticipate softer activity.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 5% versus its 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if significant housing-start declines are not followed by lower yields over 60 trading days, or if the relationship is positive in a majority of triggered samples.
